feat.name: Hungry Blade
feat.requirement: Your previous action was a Strike with your *spectral dagger* that dealt spirit damage.
feat.text: Once your *spectral dagger* has tasted an enemy’s soul, your *splinter of finality* becomes increasingly relentless in its attempts to claim the soul. Your *spectral dagger* gains the effects of a *keen* property rune that applies only to Strikes against the target of the required Strike. This effect lasts for 10 minutes or until that target dies, whichever comes first.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

traits.name: Concentrate
traits.text: An action with this trait requires a degree of mental concentration and discipline.
